## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena teams to discuss content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 articles scheduled to publish over the next few days](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Need to align on visuals/imagery style (using more purple shades)](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Plan to post 2 articles per day starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Will start reporting on search metrics once content is indexed](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Schedule

  - [10 articles ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Next week, will post 2 articles per day to maintain consistent cadence](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Visual Style Alignment

  - [Feedback to use more purple shades in imagery to align with Arena's branding](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Suggestion to desaturate background images instead of overlays](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Consideration around avoiding text in cover images for future flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

### Search/Traffic Reporting

  - [Will start pulling search console data and reporting metrics once content is indexed (2-3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Exciting to track performance graphs as content ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/sk3VLhoP59Y7kszsR6-bYh6bTay7s9WJ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
